image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Your cells run on tiny ancient power plants — and they have their own DNA.
Context visual: Meet mitochondria, the energy factories that convert food into fuel, powering every move you make.
Escalation visual: But here’s the twist: They were once free-living bacteria. Yes, you heard that right!
Evidence visual: This endosymbiotic theory explains how they became essential to our cells, merging with us over billions of years.
Payoff visual: So next time you feel energized, remember — it’s those ancient power plants working hard for you.
Cta visual: Curious about more science secrets? Like and follow for more!
